rungs.name: vDSO re-output
rungs.establishes: this exact call was answered before and the answer is reproducible

rungs.name: in-process structural
rungs.establishes: a provable refusal (deny-map / self-modify / arg-predicate) or an affirmative low-risk allow

rungs.name: posture admit-and-log
rungs.establishes: a low-risk read-shaped default-deny is safe to admit while recording a would_deny record

rungs.name: require-witness
rungs.establishes: a claimed git/object effect is corroborated by evidence the agent did not author

rungs.name: isolated-worktree keep-bit
rungs.establishes: a candidate strictly improved a measured metric AND the suite is green AND truth is clean, non-forgeably
